summary: Iteration 148 - Public Intake Consolidation Testing. All 20 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified contact page and quote request page render correctly with proper form fields. Admin dashboard shows Service Leads with various request types. Minor frontend issue: Quote request page title doesn't change for ?type=business_pricing URL param.

ui_bugs.issue: URL param ?type=business_pricing does not change page title from 'Request a Quote' to 'Request Business Pricing'

issues: Business Pricing CTA button visible but data-testid not found - may need to verify href attribute

action_items: MINOR: Verify QuoteRequestPage uses TYPE_CONFIG correctly for business_pricing type - title should change based on URL param
seed_data_creation: Created test requests via API during testing (contact_general, service_quote, business_pricing, product_bulk, promo_sample)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 148 tested public intake consolidation. All new endpoints work: POST /api/public-requests/contact creates contact_general requests with account_invite, POST /api/public-requests creates service_quote and business_pricing requests, Admin GET /api/admin/requests shows all request types, Admin POST /api/admin/requests/{id}/convert-to-lead works, Admin PUT /api/admin/requests/{id}/status works. Regression tests pass: POST /api/requests (product_bulk, promo_sample, service_quote), GET /api/requests/ctas, guest checkout, margin calculation (10000→12000). Frontend: Contact page renders with all form fields, Quote request page renders but title doesn't change for business_pricing type. Admin Service Leads page shows requests.

NEW_contact_endpoint.details: POST /api/public-requests/contact creates contact_general request with request_number and account_invite

REGRESSION_role_logins.details: All 4 role logins work (admin, customer, sales, vendor)

FRONTEND_contact_page.details: Contact page renders with all form fields (name, email, company, phone, subject, message)

FRONTEND_quote_request_page.details: Page renders but title doesn't change for ?type=business_pricing

FRONTEND_admin_service_leads.details: Admin Service Leads page shows requests with various types

mocked_apis.email_sending: Email sending is MOCKED - logged to email_logs collection, not actually dispatched. Requires Resend integration for production.
